en: The oracle concerning the wilderness of the sea. As whirlwinds in the Negeb sweep on, it comes from the wilderness, from a terrible land.
zh: 關於海旁曠野的默示： 有敵人從曠野，從可怕之地而來， 好像南地的暴風猛烈掃過一般。

en: A stern vision is told to me; the traitor betrays, and the destroyer destroys. Go up, O Elam; lay siege, O Media; all the sighing she has caused I bring to an end.
zh: 我被指示去看一個慘酷的異象： 那行詭詐的仍然行詭詐，那行破壞的仍然行破壞。 以攔哪，上去吧！瑪代啊，圍攻吧！ 我要使一切歎息止住。

en: Therefore my loins are filled with anguish; pangs have seized me, like the pangs of a woman in labor; I am bowed down so that I cannot hear; I am dismayed so that I cannot see.
zh: 因此，我滿腰疼痛， 痛苦抓住我，好像產婦的痛苦一樣； 我絞痛彎腰至聽不見，我驚惶至看不到。

en: My heart staggers; horror has appalled me; the twilight I longed for has been turned for me into trembling.
zh: 我的心迷糊，驚恐威嚇著我； 我所愛慕的黃昏，竟使我戰兢。

en: They prepare the table, they spread the rugs, they eat, they drink. Arise, O princes; oil the shield!
zh: 他們擺設筵席，鋪張地氈，又吃又喝。 領袖們，起來吧！用油抹淨盾牌。

en: For thus the Lord said to me: "Go, set a watchman; let him announce what he sees.
zh: 因為主這樣對我說： “你去設立守望的，叫他把所看見的報告出來。

en: When he sees riders, horsemen in pairs, riders on donkeys, riders on camels, let him listen diligently, very diligently."
zh: 他一看見騎兵一對一對而來， 又有驢隊和駱駝隊， 他就要留意，非常留意。”

en: Then he who saw cried out: "Upon a watchtower I stand, O Lord, continually by day, and at my post I am stationed whole nights.
zh: 後來，守望者 喊叫著說： “主啊！我每日不斷站在守望樓上， 每夜立在我守望的崗位中。

en: And behold, here come riders, horsemen in pairs!" And he answered, "Fallen, fallen is Babylon; and all the carved images of her gods he has shattered to the ground."
zh: 看哪！有一隊騎兵來了，馬兵一對一對而來。” 又有人答話說：“傾倒了，巴比倫傾倒了！ 它所有雕刻的神像都被打碎在地上了。”

en: O my threshed and winnowed one, what I have heard from the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, I announce to you.
zh: 我那被打的禾稼啊！我禾場上的穀啊！ 我從萬軍之耶和華，以色列的 神那裡聽見的， 都告訴你們了。

en: The oracle concerning Dumah. One is calling to me from Seir, "Watchman, what time of the night? Watchman, what time of the night?"
zh: 關於以東 默示： 有人從西珥呼叫我說： “守望的啊！黑夜還有多長？ 守望的啊！黑夜還有多長？”

en: The watchman says: "Morning comes, and also the night. If you will inquire, inquire; come back again."
zh: 守望的說： “早晨到了，黑夜也會再來； 你們若要問，就儘管問； 也可以回頭再來問。”

en: The oracle concerning Arabia. In the thickets in Arabia you will lodge, O caravans of Dedanites.
zh: 關於阿拉伯的默示： 底但的商隊啊！ 你們必在阿拉伯的森林中住宿。

en: To the thirsty bring water; meet the fugitive with bread, O inhabitants of the land of Tema.
zh: 提瑪地的居民哪！ 要拿水來給那些口渴的， 拿餅來接待那些逃難的。

en: For they have fled from the swords, from the drawn sword, from the bent bow, and from the press of battle.
zh: 因為他們逃避了刀劍、 已出鞘的刀劍和上了弦的弓， 以及嚴重的戰禍。

en: For thus the Lord said to me, "Within a year, according to the years of a hired worker, all the glory of Kedar will come to an end.
zh: 主對我這樣說：“按照雇工的年數，一年之內，基達的一切光榮都必化為烏有。

en: And the remainder of the archers of the mighty men of the sons of Kedar will be few, for the LORD, the God of Israel, has spoken."
zh: 弓箭手剩餘的人數，就是基達人的勇士，必定很少；這是耶和華以色列的 神說的。”
